Don't look for discounts anymore! Pepper finds the best ones for you.

🛍 YOUR SHOPPING ASSISTANT
Browse your favorite stores, and shop as usual.
The extension will alert you as soon as a discount or a good deal is available on our partner stores.


🔥 HOTTEST DEALS FROM OUR COMMUNITY
Top deals from the Pepper community at your fingertips!
Access the best deals and freebies from diverse retailers in a click, all shared by our savvy shopper community.


✨  AUTOMATIC TEST OF COUPONS
No need to search for discounts on the internet anymore!
As soon as you are on a shopping cart page, the GSG extension will automatically test all available coupons and apply the best. 


✅ YOUR PRIVACY
Pepper only identifies partner website URLs to offer you discounts when you make purchases. For more information please visit our Privacy Policy: 
- https://www.pepper.pl/privacy-policy
- https://nl.pepper.com/privacy-policy
- https://www.pepper.it/privacy

We will never collect your addresses, transactions, balances or any other personal information.

We will never sell your data to anyone.

🍪 Cookies settings

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the extension: Number of visitors, traffic source, etc. You can always change or withdraw your consent from the settings page. For more information please visit our Cookies Policy:
- https://www.pepper.pl/cookies-policy
- https://nl.pepper.com/cookiebeleid
- https://www.pepper.it/politica-cookie

🔗 TRANSPARENCY

Links within the extension are monetised, which means Pepper may earn affiliate commissions when you use it. More details available here: 
- https://help.pepper.pl/help/finansowanie-platformy 
- https://www.pepperdeals.se/vanliga-fragor#about
A tool for viewers to enjoy a smoother livestream experience. Try it on YouTube or your favorite livestream sites!

The interactive panel will appear on the side of your webpage and offer everything you need to enjoy your favorite shows. No more needing multiple tabs, all tools will appear directly in the panel without covering up the stream. This all-in-one is sure to please, try it out today!
Shopstat.ru — сервис управления своими продажами, поиска трендовых ниш и анализа конкурентов на Wildberries

Shopstat — бесплатное расширение для управления своими продажами, поиска трендовых ниш и анализа конкурентов на Wildberries.

Регистрация больше не нужна 🚀 Просто установите расширение и отслеживайте все необходимые данные.

Аналитика маркетплейсов от Shopstat поможет отслеживать:
- Любые данные по товарам, брендам, поставщикам, включая заказы, выкупы, остатки
- Ваши продажи по API [заказы, выкупы, остатки по вашему магазину]

Также наш сервис аналитики поможет найти прибыльные товары и ниши на Wildberries. 

Устанавливайте расширение сервиса аналитики Shopstat для Wildberries и будьте на шаг впереди конкурентов. 

Больше возможностей в сервисе аналитики на Shopstat.ru

аналитика маркетплейсов
аналитика по апи
статистика рынка
отслеживание трендов
продажи вб
остатки товара на складах
кабинет селлера вб

Fuelet Wallet – a self-custodial crypto wallet designed for the Fuel blockchain. 

Experience unparalleled speed and security with the fastest execution layer for modular blockchains. Fuelet Wallet is more than just a wallet; it's your all-in-one portal to the world of decentralized applications (dApps) and crypto assets.

Key Features:
- Send and Receive with Ease: Effortlessly store, send, and receive crypto assets anytime, anywhere
- Full Control in Your Hands: As a self-custodial wallet, you have complete control over your assets without intermediaries
- Explore the World of dApps: Dive into the expansive universe of decentralized applications on the Fuel blockchain
- High-Speed Transactions: Powered by Fuel – enjoy the highest flexible throughput with maximum security
- NFT Gallery: browse NFTs you have
- Backup: backup you seed phrase to avoid loosing access if you seed phrase goes loosing
- Watchlist: watch any public wallet on Fuel
- Real-time notification: instantly know when you receive crypto
- Dark mode: use dark or light mode
- Transparent Operations and History: Know exactly what's happening in your transactions
- Multi-Account Management: Create and manage multiple accounts effortlessly for diversified asset handling
- Cross-Browser Compatibility: Enjoy seamless experience on Desktop and Mobile

For feedback: hi@fuelet.app
Manage your Bittensor accounts outside of dapps.

This is a non-custodial TAO wallet operated by Tensora Group. You can use this wallet to:
  - Securely store TAO
  - Transfer TAO
  - Stake TAO to Root,  i.e. Subnet Zero (Safe staking option)
  - Sign stakes and transfers you perform on external apps
  - Multi account management
  - Customizable network settings

What's New:
  - Dynamic TAO staking
  - View subnet charts, price and performance
  - Calculate slippage and fees when staking TAO into subnet alpha tokens
  - View your past stakes and transfers in account history
  - Save contacts to your Address book
  - View this extension as a side panel or Toolbar pop-up

This extension is not tracking you, or utilizing any form of analytics. It doesn't gather addresses, keys or other personal information.
An extension to bookmark links to karakeep.app
An extension to bookmark links to karakeep.app.
線上會議自動接受工具
線上會議自動接受所有加入者請求，點擊圖示可以開啟夥伴模式。4xDev(4-x.tw)

功能說明：
1. 讓 Google Meet™ 自動接受所有加入者請求，不用再手動一個個案同意。
2. 支援自動接受單一加入者請求 與 多位加入者請求。
3. 這個擴充工具安裝後會自動啟用，因此如果想要停用功能請到擴充功能頁面手動停用。
4. 點擊擴充工具圖示可以一鍵開啟夥伴模式 (自動開新分頁以夥伴模式加入)。

請注意：
1. 這項工具並不會後台執行，因此只有在Google Meet 頁面上還會生效。
2. 這項工具適用於繁體中文與簡體中文 Google Meet 頁面。
3. 這項工具並不是由 Google Inc. 所開發。

＊擴充功能已更新至 Manifest V3

Let Google Meet™ automatically accept all join requests.
This extension will be automatically activated after installation, so if you want to disable the feature, please go to the extension page to manually disable it.
Flash Video Downloader is for fast download video and flash from website.

Flash Video Downloader can fast and easily download flash, video from most web pages.  

Click on the icon of app to display a list of available videos on the website. Second click in the list to start downloading one or all files at once to hard drive. 

Supported popular media formats are swf, flv, mkv, mp4, avi and more.

Flash Video Downloader is not responsible for files downloaded. Users should check permissions copyright on website. Thank you for understanding.
GPT Reader/Transcriber: Free AI Text to Speech/Speech to Text (TTS/STT)
Free AI text to speech (tts) & speech to text (stt) with ChatGPT. Listen to natural voices or transcribe audio instantly.

To use the extension:
1️⃣ Click the extension icon (or visit chatgpt.com)
2️⃣ Sign in with your ChatGPT account
3️⃣ Click the extension icon or the button on the ChatGPT page 
4️⃣ You will notice an overlay open where you can choose either the text to speech or speech to text option

🔥 Key Features of ChatGPT Reader & Transcriber 🔥
✅ Free to Use AI Text to Speech (TTS)
ChatGPT Reader & Transcriber is completely free to use and includes a premium tier for more serious users
✅ Download AI-Generated Audio (NEW!)
Save high-quality speech as an audio file for offline listening
✅ Read Aloud Any Text Instantly (WEB and FILE UPLOAD supported!)
Convert Google Docs, PDFs, EPUB or custom text into natural-sounding speech with one click.
✅ Human-Like AI Voices
Uses OpenAI's voices for clear, smooth, and natural narration
✅ New! Free Speech-to-Text (STT) Transcription
• Live transcription – speak and see your words appear in real-time
• File transcription – upload audio files and convert them to text
• Download transcriptions – export as PDF or TXT for easy sharing
• Unlimited & Free – no usage caps, enjoy all transcription features at no cost
✅ Supports Multiple Inputs
Paste text or upload documents—ChatGPT Reader & Transcriber handles it all
✅ Customizable Playback Controls
Adjust speed, pause, rewind, and play at your preferred pace
✅ Accessibility and Productivity
• Students – Listen to notes and papers while studying
• Professionals – Review reports and emails hands-free
• Readers with Dyslexia & Vision Impairments – Improve comprehension with assistive speech
• On-the-Go Listeners – Enjoy articles or documents while commuting, exercising, or multitasking

❗ Not affiliated with or endorsed by OpenAI or ChatGPT ❗
❗ Free alternative to sites like ElevenLabs, Speechify, Rev, Otter.ai or other text to speech/transcription services❗

🛠 Download ChatGPT Reader & Transcriber: Free AI Text to Speech & Speech to Text today and elevate your reading and transcription experience with free, high-quality AI voices and transcriptions. 🛠
ScreenApp - Record and take AI notes of meetings, videos, calls & lectures
Easily record your screen and audio with ScreenApp. Take AI Notes and summaries of any recording.

ScreenApp. Transcribe audio and screen content right from your browser or any URL. Perfect for capturing notes and summaries from lectures, meetings, webinars, podcasts, and beyond.

What it does:
- Records and uploads to the cloud instantly
- Turns audio and video into text.
- Works seamlessly in your browser: no downloads needed.
- Pulls in content from web links.
- Simplifies note-taking from any source.
- Creates concise summaries effortlessly.

Why you’ll love it:
- Saves time with instant transcription.
- Keeps everything organized in one place.
- Makes sharing a breeze.

How it works:
1. Add ScreenApp to your browser.
2. Start Recording
3. Save and process with AI
4. Chat and Summarize
一點即查，無需複製、貼上、另闢查詢網頁 - 給你更流暢的閱讀體驗。

----- 與抄筆記有關的重要小事 ❤ ----- 

➤ 經實際測試，查一個單字快 400 倍
➤ 有效促進大量閱讀(歡迎自行嘗試)
➤ 也支援看 PDF 檔案 - 網友們叫它：論文神器


----- 為什麼抄筆記? ----- 

單字連同文本原句
作成專屬你的筆記
然後 用腦科學記憶法複習
這是一套
不可分開的流程
帶你走向
抄筆記美好未來 因為
單字默默記住 就再也不用查了


----- 預設快速鍵 -----

e ─ 啟用「抄筆記」/ 快速查詢選取範圍
r ─ 單字發音
R ─ 句子發音
z ─ 啟用/關閉 功能：「斷開超連結功能」
q ─ 切換「抄筆記」視窗大小
esc ─ 關閉「抄筆記」

w ─ 「抄筆記」視窗上移
s ─ 「抄筆記」視窗下移
a ─ 「抄筆記」視窗左移
d ─ 「抄筆記」視窗右移


----- 版本記錄 -----
1.16.6
- 後台程式最佳化

1.16.5
- 重新上架
- 查詢介面邊緣顯示微調

1.16.1
- 修正無法啟動的錯誤 (Manifest v3 相關)

1.16.0
- 更新支援 Manifest v3

1.15.3
- 改進翻譯流暢度

1.15.2
- 修正部分UI顯示

1.15.1
- 修正 Chrome 76 後在 Windows 下 PDF 無法開啟
- 修正部分UI顯示

1.15.0
- 查詢速度增強
Instantly check your website's SEO, analyze competitors and get advantage of powerful search analytics in one place.

Serpstat Website SEO Checker allows you to find the key metrics of any site or page in just a few clicks. It provides you with an extensive list of SEO metrics, analysis, and tips.

To examine a domain/page, you don't need to open a new tab. Click on the icon and you'll get an SEO audit of domain or page: visibility, traffic, number of keywords, top competitors in the region, etc. 

Three sections are now available: 
* On-page SEO parameters - Free Lifetime
* Page analysis - Freemium
* Domain analysis - Freemium

Some features work without API requests to Serpstat servers so they are available without signing up, right after installation of the extension.
Some reports require to sign up and get a token for API access.

Serpstat Website SEO Checker makes analyzing competitors data easier than ever. The extension helps you to provide quickly a keyword research and trust me, it's much better than Keyword Planner tool.

The major features:

#1 On-page search engine optimization:
Page Source 
Google Cache 
PageSpeed Insights
Site start date
Meta tags
HTML tags 
Words Count / Symbols Count
Favicon checker
and many others.

#2 Page analysis: 
Top 10 keywords in Google ranking
URL that ranks for this request
Ranking position for this keyword
Position change and search volume
Keyword CPC 
URL Competitors
Keywords the site ranks in
Missing keywords

#3 Domain analysis
Domain visibility
Domain traffic
Number of keywords
Improved and declined keywords
New and lost keywords
PPC keywords
Number of results in Google, Bing
Yandex Quality Index
Number of images in Google Image Search
Alexa Rank.
Visibility change graph

In fact, we've brought together the most useful SEO features, so you no longer need a bunch of tools like Ahrefs, Semrush, Majestic and others.
Keep an eye on this - it's just the beginning, you'll see many exciting updates soon.

Important: To get full access to all functionality, you'll need to sign up on Serpstat.com

For information regarding data collection please visit:
https://serpstat.com/users/privacy-policy/
Get actionable insights on your organization's SaaS usage

Zluri is an enterprise SaaS Management Platform(SMP). It helps you discover, manage, optimize your SaaS stack from a single dashboard. In short, Zluri puts the IT Teams back in control of their new Saas-ified landscape.

Zluri helps to bring shadow IT to light, proactively monitor and manage SaaS spend, automates end-to-end SaaS apps renewal management.

Zluri is data-driven and helps IT teams simplify, plan, secure, and get the most out of their SaaS apps portfolio.

Zluri uses various ways to discover SaaS applications. The browser extension is one of them.

Zluri browser extension helps IT administrators discover the SaaS applications & used by employees of the organization.

The browser extension runs locally on the client-side to read browser activities & reports them to Zluri server for analysis, Where we identify & analyze the SaaS application-related activities & present them on the Zluri dashboard.

We collect only non-sensitive information from the browser like The URL, Title, Timestamp of opening/closing the tab. We do not read the cookies saved in the browser, browser history or any content from the websites visited.

Steps to install it:
1. Install the extension in your browser.

2. Enter your work email. 

3. We will send you a verification link on your email address. Please click on the link to verify your email & sign in.

4. This step is optional. You can enter the website urls you do not wish to be tracked for.

You can reach out to us through any of the following channels in case you face any difficulties in installing this extension.

Phone : 🇺🇸 +1 628-243-5870 🇮🇳 +91 9019 096 678

Email : tech-support@zluri.com

You can also reach out to us through the live chat window on the bottom right of the screen.

We will respond to your query within 24 hrs.

691 S Milpitas Blvd ste 217
Milpitas, CA 95035
US
Summarize YouTube videos with AI, timestamps, transcripts, bookmarks, and chat.

Clarify AI helps you understand long YouTube videos faster with AI-powered summaries, timestamps, transcript tools, translation, and follow-up questions.

Features:
- Generate a concise overview of the current video
- Summarize comments to quickly understand viewer feedback and discussion
- Jump to important moments with timestamps
- Save bookmarks for useful summaries and key moments
- View, copy, and export transcripts
- Ask follow-up questions about the content
- Use custom prompt templates for different workflows
- Adjust summary length and tone
- Translate results into 50+ languages

Useful for lectures, tutorials, interviews, podcasts, news, and other long-form content.

Open a video on YouTube, click the Clarify AI button, and get a structured summary in seconds.

1. Easily send, receive or stake your MINA, and view the transaction history anytime.

Prevents the blocking of copying from & pasting into input fields

This is a dead simple Google Chrome extension that removes copy, cut and paste blocking, by preventing sites from interfering with "copy", "cut", and "paste" browser events.

This extension does not try to prevent a site from also interfering with keyboard shortcuts related to those browser actions (control-v, command-v, etc.), nor does this extension prevent sites from interfering with the "contextmenu" event (right click menu). For those super annoying sites that interfere with keyboard shortcuts and context menu, using Edit -> Paste from the browser's menu might be required.

This is a new listing of a much older extension, that Google took down as it was tied to an old Google Workspace account that no longer exists.
Ne cherchez plus de réductions ! Dealabs trouve les meilleures pour vous.

🛍 VOTRE ASSISTANT SHOPPING ULTIME
Explorez vos marchands préférés et faites vos achats en toute simplicité avec notre extension qui améliore votre expérience en vous alertant sur les réductions et les offres intéressantes chez nos partenaires.

💰 COMPARAISON DES PRIX EN TOUTE SIMPLICITÉ
Découvrez notre nouvelle fonctionnalité de comparaison des prix ! Comparez rapidement les prix de plusieurs marchands pour obtenir la meilleure offre possible, optimisant ainsi votre expérience d'achat.

✨ VÉRIFICATION AUTOMATIQUE DES CODES PROMOS
Dites adieu aux recherches interminables de réductions ! Une fois que vous êtes sur la page du panier, l'extension Dealabs testera automatiquement et appliquera les meilleurs codes disponibles, garantissant ainsi un maximum d’économies.

🔥 LES MEILLEURS DEALS DE LA COMMUNAUTÉ À PORTÉE DE MAIN
Accédez directement aux meilleures offres de la communauté dynamique de Dealabs. Découvrez une multitude de deals partagés par les utilisateurs issus de divers marchands, en un seul clic.

✅ VOTRE VIE PRIVÉE EST NOTRE PRIORITÉ
- Chez Dealabs, nous respectons votre vie privée. Nous identifions uniquement les URL des sites web partenaires pour vous offrir des réductions au cours de vos achats. Vous pouvez trouver plus d'informations sur notre politique de confidentialité : https://www.dealabs.com/police-vie-privee

- Nous ne collectons aucune information personnelle telle que vos adresses, transactions, ou soldes de comptes.
- Nous ne vendons jamais vos données à des tiers.

🍪 PARAMÈTRES DES COOKIES
Nos cookies analytiques nous aident à comprendre les interactions avec l'extension, telles que le nombre de visiteurs et les sources de trafic. Ajustez votre consentement à tout moment depuis la page des paramètres. Pour plus d'informations, veuillez consulter notre https://www.dealabs.com/cookies-policy

🔗 TRANSPARENCE
Les liens dans l'extension sont monétisés, ce qui signifie que Dealabs peut percevoir des commissions d'affiliation lorsque vous l'utilisez. Plus de détails disponibles ici : https://help.dealabs.com/help/comment-dealabs-est-il-finance
Share your desktop or application using VIA Screen Share [Minimum VIA Version 2.5]

VIA App wirelessly mirrors your Chromebook / PC Chrome browser screen to a display using a VIA device. Just add the VIA App to your Chromebook or PC Chrome browser and login to start presenting. VIA turns any screen into a meeting point for ideas to stream freely without conventional restrictions that use up meeting resources. VIA is a wireless audio-visual integrator that connects to an existing wireless network and links every device in a meeting room to the primary presentation screen. VIA gateways are real BYOD Wireless Collaboration devices for all your presentation needs.


Minimum VIA Version - 2.5

Automatically scrolls to the next Youtube Short when one ends!

A Chrome Extension that adds an auto-scroll feature on Youtube so you can watch Shorts without the need to touch your mouse.

Whenever a YT Short ends, the extension will automatically scroll to the next one for you. Great for doing homework and watching Shorts at the same time without the need to switch tabs! 

NOTES:
- For ease, use the shortcut, shift + d (or change to your own), to toggle the auto scroller on and off.
- Created by Tyson3101 | Owned by Marek
SheetWA Bulk WA Sender - Excel, Google Sheets
Send personalised WhatsApp messages from Google Sheets, Excel Sheets. Send images and documents. Download contacts and more.

SheetWA: Your Ultimate Bulk WhatsApp Messaging Tool 🚀

Perfect for promotional campaigns, announcements, marketing, customer engagement and more.

Key Features

🤩 WhatsApp Bulk Message Sender
- Use SheetWA as your go-to WhatsApp bulk message sender. Send thousands of messages instantly to your contact list.

😁 WA Sender
- Simplify your messaging process with our WA sender. Easily manage and send messages to your audience without the hassle of manual entry.

🥳 WhatsApp Bulk SMS Sender
- You can ensure your messages reach a large audience quickly and efficiently.

Additional Features

✅ Send bulk WhatsApp messages from Google Sheets™. Streamline your workflow and reduce manual data entry.

✅ Send bulk WhatsApp messages from Excel™. Perfect for businesses that manage their contacts and messages in Excel.

✅ Automatic WhatsApp Message Sender. Automate your WhatsApp messaging campaigns with our automatic message sender.

✅ WhatsApp Marketing Software. Perfect for businesses looking to increase engagement and reach.

✅ Bulk WhatsApp Software. Ensure your messages are delivered promptly and accurately.

Benefits

- Efficiency: Streamline your workflow and reduce manual entry with our bulk WA Sender.
- Personalization: Craft personalized messages for your audience to enhance engagement.
- Affordability: Take advantage of our cost-effective solution, with both free and premium versions available.
- User-Friendly Interface: Navigate our software with ease, regardless of your technical expertise.

Why Choose SheetWA Extension‼️

Say goodbye to manual messaging! Our extension automates the process, enabling you to connect with your audience efficiently.

Enhance customer engagement with personalized messages, building stronger relationships and loyalty

Boost productivity and achieve more with our user-friendly and time-saving solution.

While SheetWA stands out as the top choice for bulk WhatsApp messages, you might also encounter other tools like Blueticks, Rocket Sender, WARocket, Prime Sender, and WA Rocket Sender. However, SheetWA offers unparalleled features and ease of use, making it the best solution for your WA marketing needs.


DISCLAIMER
Google Sheets is a trademark of Google LLC. Use of this trademark is subject to Google Permissions.

This tool is not a part of WhatsApp© or Facebook©. 

The information on this tool is for educational purposes only, we neither support nor be held responsible for any misuse of this info. This tool is not affiliated with any brand or website.

Users must use the software responsibly and adhere to the website terms or usage policy (or whatever applicable).

It's just a standalone tool to facilitate and extend some options in WA.

It's not a spam tool and not allowed to use it for spamming or violating WA policies.

This tool automates a natural human's behavior to save people's time in daily use

We do not take responsibility for how the buyer uses this software.
Achat et livraison directe d'articles commandés sur Amazon.fr dans votre pays.

Grâce à Cart'In, achetez et faites livrer directement tout ce que vous voulez parmi les innombrables articles disponibles sur le site Amazon.fr

Après le choix des articles à mettre dans le panier, cliquez sur le bouton commander et suivez les étapes jusqu'au paiement. Pendant le processus d'achat, il vous sera demandé de vous inscrire.

MP3 Downloader app downloads mp3 music from websites.

MP3 Downloader can download music tracks in mp3 format from most websites. 

Instructions:
- Click to icon on the current page for display popup.
- In the popup is showing mp3 files from current page. 
- Click to downloading one song or download all files. 
- You can playing mp3 in popup.

Notice:
MP3 Downloader is not responsible for media content which you download. We recommended to check media copyright permissions. Download of Youtube m3p to HDD is is intentionally locked.
twitterの画像ツイートにボタンを追加する拡張機能。追加されたボタンを押すとツイートの画像を原寸で新しいタブに表示する。連絡先: @hogextend

Twitterの画像ツイートの画像をワンタッチで原寸表示します。
画像ツイートに追加されたボタンを押すと、ツイートの画像を原寸で新しいタブに表示します。連絡は@hogextendまで。(「twitter画像原寸表示」から「twitter画像原寸ボタン」に改名しました！)

画像ツイートに追加される「Original」ボタンを押すことで、原寸の画像を新しいタブに開きます。
※画像URLに「:orig」ってつけるのと同じです。

This extension adds "Original" button on the image-embedded tweet in Twitter.
Click the "Original" button to open image(s) in original size.

[連絡先 / Contact]
Twitter: @hogextend

[注 / Note]
この拡張機能は、譲渡・売却の予定はありません。そのような連絡はお断りします。
I WILL NOT transfer/sell this extension under any condition. I REFUSE such requests.

[プライバシーポリシー / Privacy Policy]
https://github.com/hogashi/twitterOpenOriginalImage/blob/master/privacy-policy.md
Pop-up explanations for medical terms on any website, including question banks and medical journals.

The AMBOSS Chrome extension loads pop-up explanations and multimedia for medical terms and concepts wherever you are on the web. Whether you are on a webpage to study or look for something in the hospital, you can now get additional medical knowledge without leaving the site you are currently on. In addition, you can click on the terms and open the respective AMBOSS article to go deeper or find more multimedia content.  

Enhance the medical content on your Chrome browser with AMBOSS: 
- Get the exact knowledge you need at the right time, regardless of the website you are visiting.
- Underlined terms let you learn and explore concepts without switching browser tabs or windows, even during Qbank session revisions. 
- View relevant multimedia on the page you are visiting.
- Get in-depth knowledge on a topic whenever needed by connecting the AMBOSS articles to your browser.
- Available in English and German. 

➤ How it works: 
The AMBOSS Chrome extension finds medical terms and adds explanations in the form of pop-ups to the selected webpage. Where available, the extension loads related images for the highlighted medical term. 

The extension works on any website opened in Chrome, including Qbanks. 

➤ What is included: 

For free
- Pop-up explanations of medical terms on any website you visit, including Qbanks
- Thumbnails of media content inside the pop-ups 

With an active AMBOSS subscription
- Option to go deeper into medical terms by opening the linked AMBOSS article. In every article, you can find more information and related terms. 
- Amplify each of the related media images, including overlays, to learn to identify the respective medical conditions. 

➤ Works where you browse 
The AMBOSS Chrome extension is designed to work seamlessly in your Chrome browser. You can use it on any website, including the most popular Qbanks for exams like the USMLE, COMLEX, MCAT, and PANCE, and other medical resources.

Built to work in conjunction with Faronics Insight.

Compatible with both Faronics Insight Cloud edition as well as Faronics Insight On-Premise edition.

Records and keeps track of websites visited by students on Google Chrome and relays it to Faronics Insight.

Helps block access to unwanted sites or limit access to specific sites during assessments and quizzes.
